data.description:
## Story
6441-3168: auto-detect runner mode

## Goal
Add RED (failing) tests for the _resolve_plugin_root() function before the implementation exists.

## Files to Modify
- tests/scripts/test-ci-llm-review-runner.sh

## Implementation
Add two RED tests at the end of the test file (before the Summary section):

### test_runner_local_checkout_uses_bash_source_plugin_root
- Create a temp dir tree with plugins/dso/.dso-source-of-truth marker file
- Set CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT to point at the parent of plugins/dso/ in that temp tree
- Run ci-llm-review-runner.sh with valid ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, piped diff, mocked scripts
- Assert exit 0 (local checkout path does not error)
- Must fail RED until _resolve_plugin_root() is implemented

### test_runner_host_project_uses_dso_assets_dir
- Create a temp dir WITHOUT the marker file
- Set DSO_ASSETS_DIR to a valid temp plugin root
- Unset CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT
- Run ci-llm-review-runner.sh with valid ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, piped diff, mocked scripts
- Assert exit 0 (host-project CI path uses DSO_ASSETS_DIR)
- Must fail RED until _resolve_plugin_root() is implemented

## Acceptance Criteria
- Given the tests run before implementation: both tests FAIL (RED)
- Given local checkout marker file present and DSO_ASSETS_DIR absent: script exits 0
- Given no marker file and DSO_ASSETS_DIR set: script exits 0
- Given no marker file and DSO_ASSETS_DIR unset: script exits 1 with error message

## Testing Mode
testing_mode: RED
data.title: Write RED tests for _resolve_plugin_root() mode detection in ci-llm-review-runner.sh
